title: Experienced Crops
body:
## Tired of mining quartz, trading with villagers or grinding guardians?  
Check out this mod! It gives some love to the humble crops by making fully grown crops drop exp orbs when harvested. 

**The mod will automatically work with nearly every modded crop out there and also includes a block tag named `crops_without_exp`in case there are any particular cases you'd like to exclude.**
